name: Aldabra 4 Liquidity Opportunity Vehicle, Inc.
business: Aldabra 4 Liquidity Opportunity Vehicle, Inc. is a blank check company (special purpose acquisition company) formed for the purpose of effecting a merger or acquisition with one or more businesses. It has no current operations and intends to identify a target business in any industry. The company raised $300,150,000 in its initial public offering to fund a future business combination.
